creator: matthias.andree@gmx.de
text:
Please try this debugging patch, remove the BROKEN= tag, and give it a go.
Longer message was sent to portsmgr@, edwin, erwin and lippe, but not
presented here since it contains private end user mail not warranting a
request to publish it.

If the port fails again, I need SSH access to a machine where the self-test
gets stuck, so I can debug. No root privileges or user password required; I
will provide ssh2 keys.

HTH
Matthias
- lzo2 port maintainer -
